testcase.name: test_TC_Authentication_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Page title expected to be 're.compile('Login')' Actual value: Sign in Call log: - Expect "to_have_title" with timeout 5000ms 4 × unexpected value "Jellypod - Create Podcasts with AI Agents" - waiting for" https://www.jellypod.com/login" navigation to finish... - navigated to "https://login.jellypod.com/?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fjellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJ4YXVHWVJNNPWRVS3C641CM" 3 × unexpected value "Sign in"

testcase.failure: tests\page_1_cdbd\test_page_1_cdbd.py:34: in test_TC_Authentication_01 expect(page).to_have_title(re.compile(r"Login")) E AssertionError: Page title expected to be 're.compile('Login')' E Actual value: Sign in E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_title" with timeout 5000ms E 4 × unexpected value "Jellypod - Create Podcasts with AI Agents" E - waiting for" https://www.jellypod.com/login" navigation to finish... E - navigated to "https://login.jellypod.com/?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fjellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJ4YXVHWVJNNPWRVS3C641CM" E 3 × unexpected value "Sign in"

testcase.name: test_TC_Authentication_02

failure.message: AssertionError: Page title expected to be 're.compile('Sign Up')' Actual value: Sign up Call log: - Expect "to_have_title" with timeout 5000ms 5 × unexpected value "Jellypod - Create Podcasts with AI Agents" - waiting for" https://oauth.jellypod.com/user_management/authorize?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&provider=authkit&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fjellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&response_type=code&screen_h…" navigation to finish... - navigated to "https://login.jellypod.com/sign-up?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fjellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJ4YYSK3GVRXK410T9F1P925" 2 × unexpected value "Sign up"

testcase.failure: tests\page_1_cdbd\test_page_1_cdbd.py:43: in test_TC_Authentication_02 expect(page).to_have_title(re.compile(r"Sign Up")) E AssertionError: Page title expected to be 're.compile('Sign Up')' E Actual value: Sign up E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_title" with timeout 5000ms E 5 × unexpected value "Jellypod - Create Podcasts with AI Agents" E - waiting for" https://oauth.jellypod.com/user_management/authorize?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&provider=authkit&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fjellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&response_type=code&screen_h…" navigation to finish... E - navigated to "https://login.jellypod.com/sign-up?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fjellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJ4YYSK3GVRXK410T9F1P925" E 2 × unexpected value "Sign up"

testcase.name: test_TC_ProductUpdates_01

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for get_by_role("link", name="NewCheck out our latest produ").first

testcase.failure: tests\page_1_cdbd\test_page_1_cdbd.py:50: in test_TC_ProductUpdates_01 page.get_by_role("link", name="NewCheck out our latest produ").first.click() C:\Users\Dell\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Lib\site-packages\playwright\sync_api\_generated.py:15631: in click self._sync( C:\Users\Dell\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_locator.py:162: in click return await self._frame._click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Users\Dell\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_frame.py:566: in _click await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) C:\Users\Dell\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( C:\Users\Dell\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. E Call log: E - waiting for get_by_role("link", name="NewCheck out our latest produ").first

testcase.name: test_TC_FAQ_Accordion_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: element(s) not found Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator("//*[@id=\"faqs\"]/div[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]")

testcase.failure: tests\page_1_cdbd\test_page_1_cdbd.py:70: in test_TC_FAQ_Accordion_01 expect(page.locator('xpath=//*[@id="faqs"]/div[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]')).to_be_visible() E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: None E Error: element(s) not found E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 5000ms E - waiting for locator("//*[@id=\"faqs\"]/div[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]")
